relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains marketing campaign metadata (budgets, objectives, target segments, success metrics) while the outbound file contains fraud/scam incident reports (transaction details, risk indicators, customer account information). These represent fundamentally different domains with no meaningful field overlap; campaign_details describes promotional activities, while reported_scam_fraud describes security incidents. The systems are connected (marketing → customer_services → risk_and_compliance) but these specific files serve unrelated purposes within that pipeline.
